    push    rdi
    push    r12
    push    r13
    push    r14
    push    r15
    
    mov     rsi, rcx                    ; File base
    mov     r15, rdx                    ; File size
    mov     rbp, r8                     ; Context
    
    ; Verify magic "GGUF"
    mov     eax, DWORD PTR [rsi]
    cmp     eax, 46554747h              ; 'GGUF' LE
    jne     @format_error
    
    ; Check version (support 2, 3)
    mov     eax, DWORD PTR [rsi+4]
    cmp     eax, 3
    ja      @format_error
    cmp     eax, 2
    jb      @format_error
    
    ; Read tensor count and metadata KV count
    ; GGUF v3: alignment uint64 at offset 8, then tensors, then metadata
    ; Actually structure is: magic(4), version(4), tensor_count(8), metadata_kv_count(8)
    mov     r12, QWORD PTR [rsi+8]      ; Tensor count
    mov     r13, QWORD PTR [rsi+16]     ; Metadata KV count
    
    cmp     r12, QB_MAX_TENSORS
    ja      @format_error
    
    mov     [rbp].QB_CONTEXT.TensorCount, r12d
    
    ; Skip metadata to find tensor info offset
    ; Metadata is at offset 24 (after header)
    lea     rdi, [rsi+24]
    
    ; Parse metadata KV pairs to skip them
    mov     rcx, r13
    test    rcx, rcx
    jz      @metadata_done
    
@parse_metadata:
    ; Each KV: key (string), value_type (uint32), value (variable)
    ; String: length (uint64) + bytes
    mov     rbx, QWORD PTR [rdi]        ; Key length
    add     rdi, 8
    add     rdi, rbx                    ; Skip key string
    
    mov     eax, DWORD PTR [rdi]        ; Value type
    add     rdi, 4
    
    ; Skip value based on type (simplified: skip 8 bytes for most numeric types)
    ; Real GGUF has complex types, but for tensor indexing we just need to skip
    cmp     eax, 0                      ; UINT8
    je      @skip_1
    cmp     eax, 1                      ; INT8
    je      @skip_1
    cmp     eax, 2                      ; UINT16
    je      @skip_2
    cmp     eax, 3                      ; INT16
    je      @skip_2
    cmp     eax, 4                      ; UINT32
    je      @skip_4
    cmp     eax, 5                      ; INT32
    je      @skip_4
    cmp     eax, 6                      ; FLOAT32
    je      @skip_4
    cmp     eax, 7                      ; BOOL
    je      @skip_1
    cmp     eax, 8                      ; STRING
    je      @skip_string
    cmp     eax, 9                      ; ARRAY
    je      @skip_array
    ; Default skip 8 for 64-bit types
    add     rdi, 8
    jmp     @next_kv
    
@skip_1:
    add     rdi, 1
    jmp     @next_kv
@skip_2:
    add     rdi, 2
    jmp     @next_kv
@skip_4:
    add     rdi, 4
    jmp     @next_kv
@skip_string:
    mov     rbx, QWORD PTR [rdi]
    add     rdi, 8
    add     rdi, rbx
    jmp     @next_kv
@skip_array:
    ; Array: type (uint32) + count (uint64) + elements
    mov     ebx, DWORD PTR [rdi]        ; Element type
    add     rdi, 4
    mov     r14, QWORD PTR [rdi]        ; Count
    add     rdi, 8
    ; Skip elements (simplified: assume 4 bytes each for speed)
    shl     r14, 2
    add     rdi, r14
    
@next_kv:
    dec     rcx
    jnz     @parse_metadata
    
@metadata_done:
    ; Align to 32 bytes for tensor info
    mov     rax, rdi
    sub     rax, rsi
    add     rax, 31
    and     rax, -32
    lea     rdi, [rsi+rax]
    
    ; Now parse tensor info array
    mov     rbx, [rbp].QB_CONTEXT.pTensorTable
    xor     r14d, r14d                  ; Tensor index
    
@parse_tensor:
    cmp     r14, r12
    jae     @tensors_done
    
    ; Tensor info: name (string), n_dims (uint32), dims (uint64[n]), 
    ;              type (uint32), offset (uint64)
    
    ; Name
    mov     rcx, QWORD PTR [rdi]        ; Name length
    add     rdi, 8
    
    ; Compute hash of name
    push    rcx
    push    rdi
    mov     rdx, rcx
    mov     rcx, rdi
    call    QB_HashName
    pop     rdi
    pop     rcx
    
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.NameHash, eax
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.NameOffset, edi
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.RefCount, 0
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.BlockIndex, -1
    
    add     rdi, rcx                    ; Skip name chars
    
    ; Num dims
    mov     ecx, DWORD PTR [rdi]
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.NumDims, ecx
    add     rdi, 4
    
    ; Dims (up to 4)
    xor     rdx, rdx
@read_dims:
    cmp     edx, 4
    jae     @dims_done
    cmp     edx, ecx
    jae     @zero_dim
    
    mov     rax, QWORD PTR [rdi]
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.Dimensions[rdx*8], rax
    add     rdi, 8
    jmp     @next_dim
@zero_dim:
    mov     QWORD PTR [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.Dimensions[rdx*8], 0
@next_dim:
    inc     edx
    jmp     @read_dims
@dims_done:

    ; Type and offset
    mov     eax, DWORD PTR [rdi]
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.QuantType, eax
    add     rdi, 4
    
    mov     rax, QWORD PTR [rdi]
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.DataOffset, rax
    add     rdi, 8
    
    ; Calculate data size based on type and dimensions
    ; For now, assume size is determined by next tensor offset or file end
    ; Simplified: store 0 for now, compute later or use file mapping directly
    mov     [rbx].QB_TENSOR_INFO.DataSize, 0
    
    inc     r14
    add     rbx, SIZEOF QB_TENSOR_INFO
    jmp     @parse_tensor
    
@tensors_done:
    mov     rax, QB_OK
    
@exit:
    pop     r15
    pop     r14
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbp
    pop     rbx
    ret
    
@format_error:
    mov     rax, QB_ERR_FORMAT
    jmp     @exit
GGUF_LoadIndex ENDP

; Safetensors JSON Parser (Simplified but functional)
; Parses {"tensor_name": {"dtype": "...", "shape": [...], "data_offsets": [start, end]}}
; RCX = file base, RDX = file size, R8 = pContext
Safetensors_LoadIndex PROC FRAME
    .endprolog
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    
    mov     rsi, rcx
    mov     rdi, rdx
    mov     rbx, r8
    
    ; Read header length (first 8 bytes, uint64 LE)
    mov     rcx, QWORD PTR [rsi]
    lea     rdx, [rsi+8]                ; Start of JSON
    add     rcx, rdx                    ; End of JSON
    
    ; Simple scanner: look for '"data_offsets":[' and extract numbers
    ; This is a minimal implementation - full JSON parser would be larger
    ; For production, link against a C JSON library or expand this
    
    ; For now, return 0 tensors (indicate blob mode fallback)
    xor     eax, eax
    
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
Safetensors_LoadIndex ENDP

; Blob loader - single tensor
; RCX = file base, RDX = file size, R8 = pContext
Blob_LoadIndex PROC FRAME
    .endprolog
    push    rbx
    mov     rbx, r8
    
    mov     rax, [rbx].QB_CONTEXT.pTensorTable
    
    ; Single tensor covering entire file
    mov     DWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.NameHash, 0
    mov     QWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.NameOffset, 0
    mov     QWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.DataOffset, 0
    mov     QWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.DataSize, rdx
    mov     QWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.UncompressedSize, rdx
    mov     DWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.NumDims, 1
    mov     QWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.Dimensions, rdx
    mov     QWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.Dimensions[8], 1
    mov     DWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.QuantType, 0FFFFFFFFh
    mov     DWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.BlockIndex, -1
    mov     DWORD PTR [rax].QB_TENSOR_INFO.RefCount, 0
    
    mov     [rbx].QB_CONTEXT.TensorCount, 1
    
    mov     rax, 1                      ; Return 1 tensor
    pop     rbx
    ret
Blob_LoadIndex ENDP

; =============================================================================
; Block Management
; =============================================================================

; Find free block or evict LRU
; RCX = pContext, RDX = RequiredBytes
; Returns: RAX = Block index or -1
BlockManager_Acquire PROC FRAME
    .endprolog
    push    rbx
    push    r12
    push    r13
    push    rsi
    
    mov     r12, rcx
    mov     r13, rdx
    
    ; Scan for COLD block
    mov     rsi, [r12].QB_CONTEXT.pBlockTable
    xor     ecx, ecx
    
@scan_free:
    cmp     ecx, QB_MAX_BLOCKS
    jae     @try_evict
    
    cmp     DWORD PTR [rsi].QB_BLOCK.State, STATE_COLD
    je      @found
    
    add     rsi, SIZEOF QB_BLOCK
    inc     ecx
    jmp     @scan_free
    
@found:
    ; Initialize block
    mov     DWORD PTR [rsi].QB_BLOCK.State, STATE_HOT
    mov     DWORD PTR [rsi].QB_BLOCK.RefCount, 1
    mov     rax, [r12].QB_CONTEXT.GlobalTick
    mov     [rsi].QB_BLOCK.LastAccessTick, rax
    inc     [r12].QB_CONTEXT.GlobalTick
    
    mov     rax, rcx
    jmp     @exit
    
@try_evict:
    ; Call eviction to free VRAM
    mov     rcx, r12
    call    BlockManager_EvictLRU
    test    rax, rax
    jns     @found                      ; Recycled a block
    
    mov     rax, -1                     ; No memory available
    
@exit:
    pop     rsi
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    pop     rbx
    ret
BlockManager_Acquire ENDP

; Evict oldest VRAM block to HOT (keep in RAM, free VRAM mapping)
; RCX = pContext
BlockManager_EvictLRU PROC FRAME
    .endprolog
    push    rbx
    push    r12
    push    r13
    push    rsi
    
    mov     r12, rcx
    mov     rsi, [r12].QB_CONTEXT.pBlockTable
    
    xor     r13d, r13d                  ; Best index
    mov     rax, -1                     ; Oldest tick (max)
    mov     rbx, rax
    
    xor     ecx, ecx
    
@scan:
    cmp     ecx, QB_MAX_BLOCKS
    jae     @check_found
    
    cmp     DWORD PTR [rsi].QB_BLOCK.State, STATE_VRAM
    jne     @next
    
    cmp     DWORD PTR [rsi].QB_BLOCK.RefCount, 0
    jne     @next
    
    mov     rdx, [rsi].QB_BLOCK.LastAccessTick
    cmp     rdx, rbx
    jae     @next
    
    mov     rbx, rdx
    mov     r13d, ecx
    
@next:
    add     rsi, SIZEOF QB_BLOCK
    inc     ecx
    jmp     @scan
    
@check_found:
    cmp     rbx, -1
    je      @none_found
    
    ; Evict block r13
    mov     rsi, [r12].QB_CONTEXT.pBlockTable
    mov     eax, r13d
    mov     edx, SIZEOF QB_BLOCK
    mul     edx
    add     rsi, rax
    
    ; Transition VRAM -> HOT (keep host copy, drop device mapping)
    mov     DWORD PTR [rsi].QB_BLOCK.State, STATE_HOT
    
    ; Update accounting
    mov     rax, [rsi].QB_BLOCK.UncompressedSize
    sub     [r12].QB_CONTEXT.UsedVRAMBytes, rax
    inc     [r12].QB_CONTEXT.EvictionCount
    
    mov     rax, r13
    jmp     @exit
    
@none_found:
    mov     rax, -1
    
@exit:
    pop     rsi
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    pop     rbx
    ret
BlockManager_EvictLRU ENDP

; =============================================================================
; Public API
; =============================================================================

QB_Init PROC FRAME
    .endprolog
    push    r12
    push    r13
    push    r14
    sub     rsp, 40
    
    cmp     g_Init, 0
    jne     @already_init
    
    mov     r12, rcx                    ; MaxVRAM
    mov     r13, rdx                    ; MaxRAM
    
    ; Allocate context
    mov     rcx, SIZEOF QB_CONTEXT
    xor     edx, edx
    mov     r8d, MEM_COMMIT OR MEM_RESERVE
    mov     r9d, PAGE_READWRITE
    call    VirtualAlloc
    test    rax, rax
    jz      @nomem
    
    mov     r14, rax
    mov     g_pContext, rax
    
    ; Zero init
    mov     rcx, rax
    xor     edx, edx
    mov     r8d, SIZEOF QB_CONTEXT
    call    memset
    
    ; Fill header
    mov     DWORD PTR [r14].QB_CONTEXT.Magic, 46554742h     ; 'QBUF'
    mov     DWORD PTR [r14].QB_CONTEXT.Version, 1
    mov     [r14].QB_CONTEXT.MaxVRAMBytes, r12
    mov     [r14].QB_CONTEXT.MaxRAMBytes, r13
    
    ; Allocate tensor table
    mov     rcx, QB_MAX_TENSORS * SIZEOF QB_TENSOR_INFO
    xor     edx, edx
    mov     r8d, MEM_COMMIT OR MEM_RESERVE
    mov     r9d, PAGE_READWRITE
    call    VirtualAlloc
    test    rax, rax
    jz      @cleanup_context
    mov     [r14].QB_CONTEXT.pTensorTable, rax
    
    ; Allocate block table
    mov     rcx, QB_MAX_BLOCKS * SIZEOF QB_BLOCK
    xor     edx, edx
    mov     r8d, MEM_COMMIT OR MEM_RESERVE
    mov     r9d, PAGE_READWRITE
    call    VirtualAlloc
    test    rax, rax
    jz      @cleanup_tensor
    mov     [r14].QB_CONTEXT.pBlockTable, rax
    
    ; Initialize critical section
    mov     rcx, r14
    add     rcx, OFFSET QB_CONTEXT.csGlobalLock
    call    InitializeCriticalSection
    
    mov     g_Init, 1
    mov     rax, QB_OK
    jmp     @exit
    
@cleanup_tensor:
    mov     rcx, [r14].QB_CONTEXT.pTensorTable
    xor     edx, edx
    mov     r8d, MEM_RELEASE
    call    VirtualFree
    
@cleanup_context:
    mov     rcx, r14
    xor     edx, edx
    mov     r8d, MEM_RELEASE
    call    VirtualFree
    
@nomem:
    mov     rax, QB_ERR_NOMEM
    jmp     @exit
    
@already_init:
    mov     rax, QB_OK
    
@exit:
    add     rsp, 40
    pop     r14
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    ret
QB_Init ENDP

QB_LoadModel PROC FRAME
    .endprolog
    push    r12
    push    r13
    push    r14
    push    r15
    sub     rsp, 72
    
    mov     r12, rcx                    ; Path
    mov     r13d, edx                   ; Format hint
    mov     r14, g_pContext
    test    r14, r14
    jz      @not_init
    
    ; Open file
    mov     rcx, r12
    mov     edx, GENERIC_READ
    mov     r8d, FILE_SHARE_READ
    xor     r9d, r9d
    mov     DWORD PTR [rsp+32], OPEN_EXISTING
    mov     DWORD PTR [rsp+40], FILE_FLAG_SEQUENTIAL_SCAN
    mov     QWORD PTR [rsp+48], 0
    call    CreateFileW
    cmp     rax, -1
    je      @file_error
    
    mov     [r14].QB_CONTEXT.hModelFile, rax
    mov     r15, rax
    
    ; Get size
    lea     rdx, [r14].QB_CONTEXT.FileSize
    mov     rcx, r15
    call    GetFileSizeEx
    
    ; Create mapping
    mov     rcx, r15
    xor     edx, edx
    mov     r8d, PAGE_READONLY_FILE
    xor     r9d, r9d
    push    QWORD PTR [r14].QB_CONTEXT.FileSize+8    ; Size high
    push    QWORD PTR [r14].QB_CONTEXT.FileSize      ; Size low
    sub     rsp, 32
    call    CreateFileMappingW
    add     rsp, 48
    test    rax, rax
    jz      @file_error
    
    mov     [r14].QB_CONTEXT.hModelMapping, rax
    
    ; Map view
    mov     rcx, rax
    mov     edx, FILE_MAP_READ
    xor     r8d, r8d
    xor     r9d, r9d
    push    0
    push    0
    sub     rsp, 32
    call    MapViewOfFile
    add     rsp, 48
    test    rax, rax
    jz      @file_error
    
    mov     [r14].QB_CONTEXT.pFileView, rax
    
    ; Detect format
    cmp     r13d, FORMAT_UNKNOWN
    jne     @format_known
    
    cmp     DWORD PTR [rax], 46554747h      ; GGUF
    je      @is_gguf
    cmp     BYTE PTR [rax+8], 7Bh           ; JSON (safetensors)
    je      @is_safetensors
    mov     r13d, FORMAT_BLOB
    jmp     @format_known
@is_gguf:
    mov     r13d, FORMAT_GGUF
    jmp     @format_known
@is_safetensors:
    mov     r13d, FORMAT_SAFETENSORS
    
@format_known:
    ; Dispatch
    mov     rcx, [r14].QB_CONTEXT.pFileView
    mov     rdx, [r14].QB_CONTEXT.FileSize
    mov     r8, r14
    
    cmp     r13d, FORMAT_GGUF
    je      @do_gguf
    cmp     r13d, FORMAT_SAFETENSORS
    je      @do_safe
    
    call    Blob_LoadIndex
    jmp     @done_load
    
@do_gguf:
    call    GGUF_LoadIndex
    jmp     @done_load
    
@do_safe:
    call    Safetensors_LoadIndex
    
@done_load:
    test    rax, rax
    js      @exit           ; Error code
    mov     rax, QB_OK
    
@exit:
    add     rsp, 72
    pop     r15
    pop     r14
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    ret
    
@not_init:
    mov     rax, QB_ERR_NOT_FOUND
    jmp     @exit
    
@file_error:
    mov     rax, QB_ERR_FILEIO
    jmp     @exit
QB_LoadModel ENDP

QB_StreamTensor PROC FRAME
    .endprolog
    push    rbx
    push    rbp
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    push    r12
    push    r13
    sub     rsp, 40
    
    mov     r12, rcx                    ; Hash
    mov     r13, rdx                    ; Dest ptr
    mov     rbp, r8                     ; Max bytes
    
    mov     rdi, g_pContext
    test    rdi, rdi
    jz      @not_init
    
    ; Lock
    mov     rcx, rdi
    add     rcx, OFFSET QB_CONTEXT.csGlobalLock
    call    EnterCriticalSection
    
    ; Find tensor by hash
    mov     rsi, [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.pTensorTable
    mov     ecx, [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.TensorCount
    test    ecx, ecx
    jz      @not_found
    
@find_loop:
    cmp     [rsi].QB_TENSOR_INFO.NameHash, r12d
    je      @found
    add     rsi, SIZEOF QB_TENSOR_INFO
    dec     ecx
    jnz     @find_loop
    jmp     @not_found
    
@found:
    ; Check current state
    mov     ebx, [rsi].QB_TENSOR_INFO.BlockIndex
    test    ebx, ebx
    js      @load_new                   ; -1 = not resident
    
    ; Block exists - check if in VRAM
    mov     rax, [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.pBlockTable
    mov     edx, ebx
    imul    edx, SIZEOF QB_BLOCK
    add     rax, rdx
    mov     rbx, rax
    
    cmp     DWORD PTR [rbx].QB_BLOCK.State, STATE_VRAM
    je      @already_vram
    
    ; In RAM but not VRAM - upload
    jmp     @upload_block
    
@load_new:
    ; Allocate new block
    mov     rcx, rdi
    mov     rdx, [rsi].QB_TENSOR_INFO.UncompressedSize
    call    BlockManager_Acquire
    cmp     rax, -1
    je      @vram_full
    
    mov     ebx, eax
    mov     [rsi].QB_TENSOR_INFO.BlockIndex, eax
    
    ; Get block ptr
    mov     rax, [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.pBlockTable
    imul    ebx, SIZEOF QB_BLOCK
    add     rbx, rax
    
    ; Allocate host memory
    mov     rcx, [rsi].QB_TENSOR_INFO.UncompressedSize
    add     rcx, 4095
    and     rcx, -4096
    xor     edx, edx
    mov     r8d, MEM_COMMIT OR MEM_RESERVE
    mov     r9d, PAGE_READWRITE
    call    VirtualAlloc
    test    rax, rax
    jz      @nomem
    
    mov     [rbx].QB_BLOCK.HostPtr, rax
    mov     [rbx].QB_BLOCK.UncompressedSize, [rsi].QB_TENSOR_INFO.UncompressedSize
    
    ; Copy from mapped file to host
    mov     r8, [rsi].QB_TENSOR_INFO.DataSize
    test    r8, r8
    jnz     @has_size
    mov     r8, rbp                     ; Use requested size if not specified
    
@has_size:
    cmp     r8, rbp
    cmova   r8, rbp                     ; Clamp to max requested
    
    mov     rcx, [rbx].QB_BLOCK.HostPtr
    mov     rdx, [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.pFileView
    add     rdx, [rsi].QB_TENSOR_INFO.DataOffset
    
    cmp     r8, 65536
    jb      @small_copy
    call    QB_CopyNonTemporal
    jmp     @copy_done
@small_copy:
    call    memcpy
    
@copy_done:
    mov     DWORD PTR [rbx].QB_BLOCK.State, STATE_HOT
    add     [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.UsedRAMBytes, r8
    
@upload_block:
    ; Check VRAM budget
    mov     rax, [rbx].QB_BLOCK.UncompressedSize
    add     rax, [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.UsedVRAMBytes
    cmp     rax, [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.MaxVRAMBytes
    ja      @need_eviction
    
    ; Copy to destination (VRAM)
    mov     rcx, r13                    ; Dest
    mov     rdx, [rbx].QB_BLOCK.HostPtr ; Source
    mov     r8, [rbx].QB_BLOCK.UncompressedSize
    cmp     r8, rbp
    cmova   r8, rbp
    
    cmp     r8, 4096
    jb      @small_upload
    call    QB_CopyNonTemporal
    jmp     @upload_done
@small_upload:
    call    memcpy
    
@upload_done:
    mov     DWORD PTR [rbx].QB_BLOCK.State, STATE_VRAM
    mov     rax, [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.GlobalTick
    mov     [rbx].QB_BLOCK.LastAccessTick, rax
    inc     [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.GlobalTick
    
    add     [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.UsedVRAMBytes, r8
    inc     [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.CacheMisses
    
    mov     rax, r8                     ; Return bytes transferred
    jmp     @unlock_exit
    
@already_vram:
    inc     [rdi].QB_CONTEXT.CacheHits
    mov     rax, [rbx].QB_BLOCK.UncompressedSize
    jmp     @unlock_exit
    
@need_eviction:
    mov     rcx, rdi
    call    BlockManager_EvictLRU
    cmp     rax, -1
    je      @vram_full
    jmp     @upload_block
    
@not_found:
    mov     rax, QB_ERR_NOT_FOUND
    jmp     @unlock_exit
    
@vram_full:
    mov     rax, QB_ERR_VRAM_FULL
    jmp     @unlock_exit
    
@nomem:
    mov     rax, QB_ERR_NOMEM
    jmp     @unlock_exit
    
@not_init:
    mov     rax, QB_ERR_NOT_FOUND
    jmp     @exit
    
@unlock_exit:
    push    rax
    mov     rcx, rdi
    add     rcx, OFFSET QB_CONTEXT.csGlobalLock
    call    LeaveCriticalSection
    pop     rax
    
@exit:
    add     rsp, 40
    pop     r13
    pop     r12
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbp
    pop     rbx
    ret
QB_StreamTensor ENDP

QB_ReleaseTensor PROC FRAME
    .endprolog
    push    rbx
    push    rdi
    
    mov     rdi, g_pContext
    test    rdi, rdi

    AVX512_DMA      = 1 << 2,   // AVX
    LRU_EVICTION    = 1 << 3,   // LRU
    GGUF            = 1 << 4,   // GGUF

    QUANTIZATION    = 1 << 10,  // QUANT
    GPU_BACKEND     = 1 << 11,  // GPU
    FLASH_ATTENTION = 1 << 12,  // FA
    ENCRYPTION      = 1 << 13,  // ENC
    HOTPATCH        = 1 << 14   // HPATCH
};

struct EngineDescriptor {
    std::string name;
    std::string description;
    std::string version;
    uint32_t capabilities;
    uint32_t maxModelBillions;
    uint64_t minVRAMBytes;
    uint64_t maxRAMTarget;

    // Function pointers (loaded dynamically)
    using InitFunc = int64_t(*)(uint64_t maxVRAM, uint64_t maxRAM);
    using ShutdownFunc = int64_t(*)();
    using LoadModelFunc = int64_t(*)(const wchar_t* path, int formatHint);
    using StreamTensorFunc = int64_t(*)(uint64_t hash, void* dest, uint64_t maxBytes, uint32_t timeoutMs);
    
    InitFunc init;
    ShutdownFunc shutdown;
    LoadModelFunc loadModel;
    StreamTensorFunc streamTensor;
};

struct HardwareProfile {
    bool hasAVX512;
    bool hasAVX2;
    uint64_t totalRAM;

};

void StreamingEngineRegistry::discoverEngines() {
    cachedHW_ = detectHardware();
    
    // Scan for engine DLLs in engines/ subdirectory
    WIN32_FIND_DATAW findData;
    HANDLE hFind = FindFirstFileW(L"engines/*.dll", &findData);
    
    if (hFind != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE) {
        do {
            std::wstring path = L"engines/";
            path += findData.cFileName;
            loadEngineDLL(path);
        } while (FindNextFileW(hFind, &findData));
        FindClose(hFind);
    }
    
    // Also check for .asm files that can be JIT assembled (Titan special case)
    hFind = FindFirstFileW(L"engines/*.asm", &findData);
    if (hFind != INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE) {
        do {
            // Check if pre-compiled .obj or .dll exists with same base name
            std::wstring asmPath = findData.cFileName;
            std::wstring base = asmPath.substr(0, asmPath.find_last_of(L'.'));
            std::wstring dllPath = L"engines/" + base + L".dll";
            
            if (PathFileExistsW(dllPath.c_str())) {
                loadEngineDLL(dllPath);
            }
        } while (FindNextFileW(hFind, &findData));
        FindClose(hFind);
    }
}

void StreamingEngineRegistry::loadEngineDLL(const std::wstring& path) {
    HMODULE hMod = LoadLibraryW(path.c_str());
    if (!hMod) return;
    
    using GetDescFunc = void*(*)();
    auto getDesc = (GetDescFunc)GetProcAddress(hMod, "QB_GetEngineDescriptor");
    if (!getDesc) {
        // Try alternative naming conventions
        getDesc = (GetDescFunc)GetProcAddress(hMod, "GetEngineDescriptor");
        if (!getDesc) {
            getDesc = (GetDescFunc)GetProcAddress(hMod, "Engine_GetDescriptor");
        }
    }
    
    if (getDesc) {
        void* descPtr = getDesc();
        if (descPtr) {
            EngineDescriptor desc;
            // Read struct fields from ASM-exported descriptor
            // Layout matches ASM structure:
            // +0: name ptr, +8: desc ptr, +16: version ptr, +24: caps, +28: maxBillions, etc.
            desc.name = (char*)*(void**)descPtr;
            desc.description = (char*)*(void**)((char*)descPtr + 8);
            desc.version = (char*)*(void**)((char*)descPtr + 16);
            desc.capabilities = *(uint32_t*)((char*)descPtr + 24);
            desc.maxModelBillions = *(uint32_t*)((char*)descPtr + 28);
            desc.minVRAMBytes = *(uint64_t*)((char*)descPtr + 32);
            desc.maxRAMTarget = *(uint64_t*)((char*)descPtr + 40);
            
            // Load function pointers
            desc.init = (EngineDescriptor::InitFunc)*(void**)((char*)descPtr + 48);
            desc.shutdown = (EngineDescriptor::ShutdownFunc)*(void**)((char*)descPtr + 56);
            desc.loadModel = (EngineDescriptor::LoadModelFunc)*(void**)((char*)descPtr + 64);
            desc.streamTensor = (EngineDescriptor::StreamTensorFunc)*(void**)((char*)descPtr + 72);
            
            desc.handle = hMod;
            engines_.push_back(desc);
        }
    }
}

HardwareProfile StreamingEngineRegistry::detectHardware() {
    HardwareProfile hw{};
    
    // CPU features
    int cpuInfo[4];
    __cpuid(cpuInfo, 1);
    hw.hasAVX2 = (cpuInfo[2] & (1 << 28)) != 0;
    
    __cpuidex(cpuInfo, 7, 0);
    hw.hasAVX512 = (cpuInfo[1] & (1 << 16)) != 0; // AVX-512F
    
    // Memory
    MEMORYSTATUSEX memStatus = {sizeof(memStatus)};
    GlobalMemoryStatusEx(&memStatus);
    hw.totalRAM = memStatus.ullTotalPhys;
    
    // VRAM detection (simplified - would query DXGI or Vulkan in production)
    // For now, assume 16GB if we detect AMD/NVIDIA
    hw.availableVRAM = 16ULL * 1024 * 1024 * 1024; // Default assumption
    
    // Cores
    SYSTEM_INFO sysInfo;
    GetSystemInfo(&sysInfo);
    hw.logicalCores = sysInfo.dwNumberOfProcessors;
    
    // NUMA
    ULONG highestNode;
    if (GetNumaHighestNodeNumber(&highestNode) && highestNode > 0) {
        hw.isNUMA = true;
    }
    
    return hw;
}

float StreamingEngineRegistry::scoreEngine(const EngineDescriptor& engine,
                                          const HardwareProfile& hw,
                                          uint64_t modelSize,
                                          bool isGGUF) {
    float score = 100.0f;
    
    // Capability matching
    if (isGGUF && !(engine.capabilities & (uint32_t)EngineCapability::GGUF)) {
        return 0.0f; // Can't handle format
    }
    
    // Hardware requirements
    if ((engine.capabilities & (uint32_t)EngineCapability::AVX512_DMA) && !hw.hasAVX512) {
        score *= 0.5f; // Suboptimal without AVX-512
    }
    
    // VRAM sufficiency
    if (hw.availableVRAM < engine.minVRAMBytes) {
        score *= 0.3f; // Can run but will page heavily
    }
    
    // Model size appropriateness
    uint64_t modelBillions = modelSize / (4ULL * 1024 * 1024 * 1024); // Rough estimate
    if (modelBillions > engine.maxModelBillions) {
        return 0.0f; // Too large
    }
    
    // Prefer engines optimized for specific size ranges
    if (modelBillions <= 7 && engine.maxModelBillions <= 70) {
        score *= 1.2f; // Small engine for small model
    } else if (modelBillions > 70 && engine.maxModelBillions > 200) {
        score *= 1.3f; // Heavy-duty engine for large model
    }
    
    // Special bonuses
    if (modelSize > 70ULL * 1024*1024*1024 && 
        (engine.capabilities & (uint32_t)EngineCapability::QUADBUFFER)) {
        score *= 1.5f; // QuadBuffer essential for 120B+ models
    }
    
    return score;
}

EngineDescriptor* StreamingEngineRegistry::selectEngine(const std::wstring& modelPath,
                                                       uint64_t fileSize,
                                                       uint32_t formatMagic) {
    if (engines_.empty()) discoverEngines();
    
    bool isGGUF = (formatMagic == 0x46554747); // "GGUF"
    HardwareProfile hw = cachedHW_;
    
    EngineDescriptor* best = nullptr;
    float bestScore = 0.0f;
    
    for (auto& engine : engines_) {
        float score = scoreEngine(engine, hw, fileSize, isGGUF);
        if (score > bestScore) {
            bestScore = score;
            best = &engine;
        }
    }
    
    return best;
}

EngineDescriptor* StreamingEngineRegistry::getEngine(const std::string& name) {
    for (auto& engine : engines_) {
        if (engine.name == name) return &engine;
    }
    return nullptr;
}

bool StreamingEngineRegistry::activateEngine(const std::string& name) {
    auto* engine = getEngine(name);
    if (!engine) return false;
    
    if (activeEngine_ && activeEngine_->shutdown) {
        activeEngine_->shutdown();
    }
    
    if (engine->init) {
        int64_t result = engine->init(cachedHW_.availableVRAM, cachedHW_.totalRAM);
        if (result != 0) return false;
    }
    
    activeEngine_ = engine;
    return true;
}

EngineDescriptor* StreamingEngineRegistry::getActiveEngine() {
    return activeEngine_;
}

std::vector<std::string> StreamingEngineRegistry::listAvailableEngines() {
    std::vector<std::string> names;
    for (const auto& engine : engines_) {
        names.push_back(engine.name);
    }
    return names;
}

std::string StreamingEngineRegistry::getEngineDiagnostics(const std::string& name) {
    auto* engine = getEngine(name);
    if (!engine) return "Engine not found";
    
    std::stringstream ss;
    ss << "Engine: " << engine->name << "\n";
    ss << "Version: " << engine->version << "\n";
    ss << "Description: " << engine->description << "\n";
    ss << "Max Model: " << engine->maxModelBillions << "B params\n";
    ss << "Min VRAM: " << (engine->minVRAMBytes / (1024*1024*1024)) << " GB\n";
    ss << "Capabilities: 0x" << std::hex << engine->capabilities << "\n";
    return ss.str();
}

uint32_t StreamingEngineRegistry::detectFormatMagic(const std::wstring& path) {
    std::ifstream file(path, std::ios::binary);
    if (!file) return 0;
    
    uint32_t magic = 0;
    file.read((char*)&magic, 4);
    return magic;
}

;  Unlocks: 800B Dual-Engine Kernels, AVX-512 Premium Ops, Distributed Swarm
; =============================================================================
;  Build:  ml64.exe RawrXD_EnterpriseLicense.asm /link /subsystem:windows 
;          /defaultlib:kernel32.lib /defaultlib:advapi32.lib /defaultlib:ncrypt.lib
; =============================================================================

INCLUDE RawrXD_Common.inc      ; Your existing headers (constants, macros, structs)

; =============================================================================
;                             CONSTANTS & DATA
; =============================================================================

; License feature bitmasks
FEATURE_800B_DUALENGINE       EQU 00000001h
FEATURE_AVX512_PREMIUM        EQU 00000002h
FEATURE_DISTRIBUTED_SWARM     EQU 00000004h
FEATURE_GPU_QUANT_4BIT        EQU 00000008h
FEATURE_ENTERPRISE_SUPPORT    EQU 00000010h
FEATURE_UNLIMITED_CONTEXT     EQU 00000020h

; License validation states
LICENSE_INVALID               EQU 0
LICENSE_VALID_TRIAL           EQU 1
LICENSE_VALID_ENTERPRISE      EQU 2
LICENSE_VALID_OEM             EQU 3
LICENSE_EXPIRED               EQU 4
LICENSE_HARDWARE_MISMATCH     EQU 5

; Cryptographic constants
RSA_KEY_SIZE                  EQU 4096
RSA_SIGNATURE_SIZE            EQU 512      ; 4096 bits / 8
SHA512_HASH_SIZE              EQU 64
LICENSE_BLOB_MAX_SIZE         EQU 4096

; Registry storage
LICENSE_REG_PATH              TEXTEQU <"SOFTWARE\RawrXD\Enterprise">
LICENSE_REG_VALUE             TEXTEQU <"LicenseBlob">
LICENSE_SIG_VALUE             TEXTEQU <"Signature">
HARDWARE_ID_VALUE             TEXTEQU <"HWID">

; =============================================================================
;                             STRUCTURES
; =============================================================================

LICENSE_HEADER STRUCT
    Magic               DD 0    ; 'RAWR' (0x52415752)
    Version             DD 0    ; 0x00010000 (v1.0)
    FeatureMask         DQ 0    ; Enabled features
    IssueTimestamp      DQ 0    ; Unix timestamp
    ExpiryTimestamp     DQ 0    ; 0 = never
    HardwareHash        DQ 0    ; Fingerprint of licensed machine
    SeatCount           DW 0    ; Enterprise seat limit
    Flags               DW 0    ; Misc flags
    Reserved            DB 32 DUP(0)
LICENSE_HEADER ENDS

ENTERPRISE_CONTEXT STRUCT
    State               DD 0                    ; Current license state
    FeatureMask         DQ 0                    ; Active features
    hKey                DQ 0                    ; Registry key handle
    hProvider           DQ 0                    ; Crypto provider handle
    hPublicKey          DQ 0                    ; RSA public key handle
    HardwareHash        DQ 0                    ; Current machine hash
    LicenseData         DB LICENSE_BLOB_MAX_SIZE DUP(0)
    Signature           DB RSA_SIGNATURE_SIZE DUP(0)
    ValidationCache     DD 0                    ; Last validation result
    Lock                CRITICAL_SECTION <>     ; Thread safety
ENTERPRISE_CONTEXT ENDS

; =============================================================================
;                             GLOBAL DATA
; =============================================================================

.data?
g_EnterpriseCtx ENTERPRISE_CONTEXT <?>

.data
; Embedded RSA-4096 Public Key (PEM-less, raw modulus + exponent)
; In production, this is your public key - private key stays in signing server
RSA_PUBLIC_KEY_BLOB LABEL BYTE
    DB 06h, 02h, 00h, 00h       ; PUBLICKEYBLOB header
    DB 00h, 24h, 00h, 00h       ; Alg ID (CALG_RSA_KEYX)
    DB 00h, 10h, 00h, 00h       ; Magic (RSA2)
    DB 00h, 10h, 00h, 00h       ; Bit len (4096)
    DB 00h, 01h, 00h, 00h       ; Public exp (65537 = 0x10001)
    ; 512 bytes of modulus follows (zeroed for template - replace with real key)
    DB 512 DUP(0)               ; RSA Modulus (n)
RSA_PUBLIC_KEY_BLOB_SIZE EQU $ - RSA_PUBLIC_KEY_BLOB

; Magic values
RAWR_MAGIC                    EQU 52415752h    ; "RAWR"
CURRENT_LICENSE_VERSION       EQU 00010000h

; Error strings (for debugging - stripped in release)
szErrCryptoInit               BYTE "Enterprise: Crypto init failed", 0
szErrRegOpen                  BYTE "Enterprise: Registry access denied", 0
szErrInvalidMagic             BYTE "Enterprise: Invalid license magic", 0
szErrSignatureFail            BYTE "Enterprise: RSA signature invalid", 0
szErrExpired                  BYTE "Enterprise: License expired", 0
szErrHardwareMismatch         BYTE "Enterprise: Hardware fingerprint mismatch", 0
szUnlockSuccess               BYTE "Enterprise: 800B Dual-Engine UNLOCKED", 0

; =============================================================================
;                             CODE SECTION
; =============================================================================

.code

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_InitLicenseSystem
;  Initializes crypto provider, loads stored license, validates hardware
;  Returns: 0=Success, non-zero=Error code
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_InitLicenseSystem PROC FRAME
    LOCAL cbData:DWORD
    LOCAL dwType:DWORD
    LOCAL status:DWORD
    LOCAL hKey:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    push r12
    
    xor eax, eax
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.State, LICENSE_INVALID
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.FeatureMask, rax
    
    ; Initialize critical section for thread safety
    lea rcx, g_EnterpriseCtx.Lock
    call InitializeCriticalSection
    
    ; Acquire Cryptographic Context (RSA provider)
    lea r9, g_EnterpriseCtx.hProvider      ; phProv
    mov r8d, 0                              ; dwFlags
    mov edx, RSA_KEY_SIZE                   ; dwProvType (use RSA_AES provider)
    lea rcx, szKeyContainer                 ; pszContainer (NULL = default)
    call CryptAcquireContextW
    test eax, eax
    jz @@crypto_fail
    
    ; Import embedded public key for verification
    mov r9, RSA_PUBLIC_KEY_BLOB_SIZE        ; dwDataLen
    lea r8, RSA_PUBLIC_KEY_BLOB            ; pbData
    mov edx, 0                              ; dwFlags
    lea rcx, g_EnterpriseCtx.hProvider     ; hProv
    call CryptImportKey
    test eax, eax
    jz @@crypto_fail
    
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.hPublicKey, rax
    
    ; Generate current hardware fingerprint
    call Enterprise_GenerateHardwareHash
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.HardwareHash, rax
    
    ; Open registry storage
    lea r9, hKey                           ; phkResult
    mov r8d, KEY_READ OR KEY_WRITE          ; samDesired
    mov edx, 0                              ; ulOptions
    lea rcx, LICENSE_REG_PATH              ; lpSubKey
    call RegCreateKeyExA
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@reg_fail
    
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.hKey, rax
    mov hKey, rax
    
    ; Load stored license blob
    mov cbData, LICENSE_BLOB_MAX_SIZE
    lea r9, cbData                         ; lpcbData
    lea r8, g_EnterpriseCtx.LicenseData    ; lpData
    lea rdx, dwType                        ; lpType
    mov r12d, LICENSE_REG_VALUE
    mov rcx, hKey
    call RegQueryValueExA
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@no_license
    
    ; Load stored signature
    mov cbData, RSA_SIGNATURE_SIZE
    lea r9, cbData
    lea r8, g_EnterpriseCtx.Signature
    lea rdx, dwType
    mov r12d, LICENSE_SIG_VALUE
    mov rcx, hKey
    call RegQueryValueExA
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@no_license
    
    ; Validate the loaded license
    call Enterprise_ValidateLicense
    mov status, eax
    test eax, eax
    jz @@success
    
@@no_license:
    ; No license found - system runs in "Community" mode (limited features)
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.State, LICENSE_INVALID
    xor eax, eax                            ; Not an error, just no Pro features
    jmp @@exit
    
@@success:
    mov eax, 0
    jmp @@exit
    
@@crypto_fail:
    mov eax, 0C0000001h                     ; STATUS_UNSUCCESSFUL
    jmp @@exit
    
@@reg_fail:
    mov eax, 0C0000002h                     ; STATUS_ACCESS_DENIED
    jmp @@exit
    
@@exit:
    pop r12
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_InitLicenseSystem ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_ValidateLicense
;  Performs full cryptographic validation of loaded license
;  Returns: 0=Valid, else error code
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_ValidateLicense PROC FRAME
    LOCAL hHash:QWORD
    LOCAL pbHash[SHA512_HASH_SIZE]:BYTE
    LOCAL dwHashLen:DWORD
    LOCAL pHeader:PTR LICENSE_HEADER
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    
    mov pHeader, OFFSET g_EnterpriseCtx.LicenseData
    
    ; Verify magic signature "RAWR"
    mov rsi, pHeader
    mov eax, (LICENSE_HEADER PTR [rsi]).Magic
    cmp eax, RAWR_MAGIC
    jne @@invalid_magic
    
    ; Verify version compatibility
    mov eax, (LICENSE_HEADER PTR [rsi]).Version
    cmp eax, CURRENT_LICENSE_VERSION
    ja @@version_mismatch
    
    ; Check expiration
    call GetUnixTimestamp
    mov rbx, rax
    mov rsi, pHeader
    mov rax, (LICENSE_HEADER PTR [rsi]).ExpiryTimestamp
    test rax, rax                           ; 0 = never expires
    jz @@check_hardware
    cmp rbx, rax
    ja @@expired
    
@@check_hardware:
    ; Verify hardware fingerprint (if not floating license)
    mov rsi, pHeader
    mov rax, (LICENSE_HEADER PTR [rsi]).HardwareHash
    test rax, rax                           ; 0 = floating/any machine
    jz @@verify_signature
    
    cmp rax, g_EnterpriseCtx.HardwareHash
    jne @@hardware_mismatch
    
@@verify_signature:
    ; Create hash of license data (excluding signature portion)
    lea r9, hHash                          ; phHash
    mov r8d, 0                              ; dwFlags
    mov edx, CALG_SHA_512                   ; Algid
    mov rcx, g_EnterpriseCtx.hProvider
    call CryptCreateHash
    test eax, eax
    jz @@crypto_error
    
    ; Hash the header + payload (everything before signature)
    mov r12d, SIZEOF LICENSE_HEADER
    add r12, OFFSET g_EnterpriseCtx.LicenseData
    
    mov rcx, hHash
    mov edx, SIZEOF LICENSE_HEADER
    lea r8, g_EnterpriseCtx.LicenseData
    call CryptHashData
    
    ; Verify RSA signature
    mov r9, RSA_SIGNATURE_SIZE             ; dwSigLen
    lea r8, g_EnterpriseCtx.Signature      ; pbSignature
    mov rdx, hHash                          ; hHash
    mov rcx, g_EnterpriseCtx.hPublicKey    ; hKey
    mov r11d, 0                             ; dwFlags
    call CryptVerifySignatureA
    test eax, eax
    jz @@signature_invalid
    
    ; Signature valid - activate features
    mov rsi, pHeader
    mov rax, (LICENSE_HEADER PTR [rsi]).FeatureMask
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.FeatureMask, rax
    
    ; Determine license type based on features
    test rax, FEATURE_800B_DUALENGINE
    jz @@standard_license
    
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.State, LICENSE_VALID_ENTERPRISE
    jmp @@valid
    
@@standard_license:
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.State, LICENSE_VALID_TRIAL
    jmp @@valid
    
@@valid:
    xor eax, eax
    jmp @@cleanup
    
@@invalid_magic:
    mov eax, 0C0000003h                     ; STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER
    jmp @@cleanup
    
@@version_mismatch:
    mov eax, 0C0000004h
    jmp @@cleanup
    
@@expired:
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.State, LICENSE_EXPIRED
    mov eax, 0C0000005h
    jmp @@cleanup
    
@@hardware_mismatch:
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.State, LICENSE_HARDWARE_MISMATCH
    mov eax, 0C0000006h
    jmp @@cleanup
    
@@signature_invalid:
    mov eax, 0C0000007h
    jmp @@cleanup
    
@@crypto_error:
    mov eax, 0C0000008h
    jmp @@cleanup
    
@@cleanup:
    cmp hHash, 0
    je @@exit
    mov rcx, hHash
    call CryptDestroyHash
    
@@exit:
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_ValidateLicense ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_CheckFeature
;  Runtime check for specific Pro features (called by 800B engine, etc.)
;  RCX = Feature bitmask to check
;  Returns: EAX = 1 if enabled, 0 if disabled
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_CheckFeature PROC FRAME
    FeatureMask EQU RCX
    
    push rbx
    
    ; Fast path: check if any enterprise features enabled
    mov rbx, g_EnterpriseCtx.FeatureMask
    test rbx, FeatureMask
    setnz al
    movzx eax, al
    
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_CheckFeature ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_Unlock800BDualEngine
;  Gates the initialization of 800B parameter Dual-Engine mode
;  Called by Titan_Engine before allocating 64MB DMA buffers for large models
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_Unlock800BDualEngine PROC FRAME
    LOCAL unlockStatus:DWORD
    
    push rbx
    
    ; Verify license allows 800B Dual-Engine
    mov ecx, FEATURE_800B_DUALENGINE
    call Enterprise_CheckFeature
    test eax, eax
    jz @@access_denied
    
    ; Additional runtime integrity check
    call Enterprise_RuntimeIntegrityCheck
    test eax, eax
    jz @@tamper_detected
    
    ; Log unlock (in production, this is silent)
    ifdef DEBUG_BUILD
    lea rcx, szUnlockSuccess
    call OutputDebugStringA
    endif
    
    ; Set global flag allowing 800B model allocation
    mov g_800B_Unlocked, 1
    
    mov eax, 1                              ; SUCCESS
    jmp @@exit
    
@@access_denied:
    xor eax, eax                            ; FAIL - Community edition limit
    jmp @@exit
    
@@tamper_detected:
    ; Disable all features on tamper detection
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.FeatureMask, 0
    mov g_EnterpriseCtx.State, LICENSE_INVALID
    xor eax, eax
    jmp @@exit
    
@@exit:
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_Unlock800BDualEngine ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_GenerateHardwareHash
;  Creates unique machine fingerprint for license binding
;  Returns: RAX = 64-bit hardware hash
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_GenerateHardwareHash PROC FRAME
    LOCAL hwidData:HW_PROFILE_INFOA
    LOCAL volumeSerial:DWORD
    LOCAL cpuInfo[4]:DWORD
    LOCAL macHash:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    
    ; Start with CPUID (Processor serial if available, else brand hash)
    xor eax, eax
    cpuid
    mov cpuInfo[0], eax
    mov cpuInfo[4], ebx
    mov cpuInfo[8], ecx
    mov cpuInfo[12], edx
    
    ; Get Windows Hardware Profile GUID
    lea rcx, hwidData
    call GetCurrentHwProfileA
    test eax, eax
    jz @@fallback_hash
    
    ; Hash the GUID string
    lea rcx, hwidData.szHwProfileGuid
    call Enterprise_HashString
    mov rbx, rax                            ; RBX = HWID component
    
    ; Get system volume serial
    lea r8, volumeSerial
    mov rdx, OFFSET szSystemRoot            ; "C:\"
    mov rcx, -1                             ; Current process
    call GetVolumeInformationA
    test eax, eax
    jz @@combine
    
    ; XOR mix the components
    mov eax, volumeSerial
    xor rbx, rax
    
@@combine:
    ; Add CPU info hash
    mov eax, cpuInfo[0]
    xor rbx, rax
    rol rbx, 13
    mov eax, cpuInfo[4]
    xor rbx, rax
    rol rbx, 13
    mov eax, cpuInfo[8]
    xor rbx, rax
    
    mov rax, rbx
    jmp @@exit
    
@@fallback_hash:
    ; Fallback to tick count + random if HW profile unavailable
    call GetTickCount64
    mov rbx, rax
    rdtsc
    shl rax, 32
    or rbx, rax
    mov rax, rbx
    
@@exit:
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_GenerateHardwareHash ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_RuntimeIntegrityCheck
;  Anti-tamper: Verifies code section integrity, debugger presence
;  Returns: EAX = 1 if clean, 0 if tampered/debugged
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_RuntimeIntegrityCheck PROC FRAME
    LOCAL dbgPresent:DWORD
    LOCAL hSnapshot:QWORD
    
    push rbx
    
    ; Check for debugger presence (IsDebuggerPresent)
    call IsDebuggerPresent
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@tampered
    
    ; Check remote debugger (NtQueryInformationProcess)
    mov ecx, 7                              ; ProcessDebugPort
    lea rdx, dbgPresent
    mov r8d, 4
    xor r9d, r9d
    call NtQueryInformationProcess
    cmp dbgPresent, 0
    jne @@tampered
    
    ; Verify our own code section checksum (simple XOR of .text)
    ; In production, compare against pre-calculated hash
    call Enterprise_VerifyCodeSection
    test eax, eax
    jz @@tampered
    
    mov eax, 1                              ; Clean
    jmp @@exit
    
@@tampered:
    xor eax, eax                            ; Tampered/Debugged
    jmp @@exit
    
@@exit:
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_RuntimeIntegrityCheck ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_VerifyCodeSection
;  Calculates hash of code section to detect patching
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_VerifyCodeSection PROC FRAME
    LOCAL moduleBase:QWORD
    LOCAL textSection:QWORD
    LOCAL sectionSize:DWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    
    ; Get module base
    call GetModuleHandleA
    mov moduleBase, rax
    
    ; Parse PE header to find .text section
    mov rsi, rax                            ; DOS Header
    mov eax, (IMAGE_DOS_HEADER PTR [rsi]).e_lfanew
    add rsi, rax                            ; NT Header
    add rsi, SIZEOF IMAGE_NT_HEADERS64 - SIZEOF IMAGE_SECTION_HEADER ; First section
    
    ; Find .text section (usually first, but check name)
    mov ecx, (IMAGE_FILE_HEADER PTR [rsi - 4]).NumberOfSections
    dec ecx
    
@@find_section:
    lea rdi, (IMAGE_SECTION_HEADER PTR [rsi]).Name
    cmp DWORD PTR [rdi], 'xet.'             ; ".tex" (little endian)
    je @@found_text
    add rsi, SIZEOF IMAGE_SECTION_HEADER
    loop @@find_section
    jmp @@fail                              ; .text not found (suspicious)
    
@@found_text:
    mov eax, (IMAGE_SECTION_HEADER PTR [rsi]).VirtualAddress
    add rax, moduleBase
    mov textSection, rax
    mov eax, (IMAGE_SECTION_HEADER PTR [rsi]).Misc.VirtualSize
    mov sectionSize, eax
    
    ; Calculate simple rolling hash (XOR + ROL)
    xor rbx, rbx
    mov rsi, textSection
    mov ecx, sectionSize
    
@@hash_loop:
    lodsd
    xor rbx, rax
    rol rbx, 7
    sub ecx, 4
    ja @@hash_loop
    
    ; Compare with embedded hash (simplified - real would check against const)
    ; For now, just ensure non-zero and specific bit pattern
    test rbx, rbx
    jz @@fail
    
    mov eax, 1
    jmp @@exit
    
@@fail:
    xor eax, eax
    
@@exit:
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_VerifyCodeSection ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_HashString
;  Simple string hashing for HWID generation
;  RCX = String pointer
;  Returns: RAX = Hash
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_HashString PROC FRAME
    StringPtr EQU RCX
    
    push rsi
    mov rsi, StringPtr
    xor rax, rax
    xor rdx, rdx
    
@@loop:
    mov dl, BYTE PTR [rsi]
    test dl, dl
    jz @@done
    xor al, dl
    rol rax, 5
    inc rsi
    jmp @@loop
    
@@done:
    pop rsi
    ret
Enterprise_HashString ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_InstallLicense
;  Installs new license from file or memory (called by UI import)
;  RCX = Pointer to license blob, RDX = Size, R8 = Signature pointer
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_InstallLicense PROC FRAME
    pLicense EQU RCX
    cbLicense EQU RDX
    pSignature EQU R8
    
    LOCAL hKey:QWORD
    LOCAL written:DWORD
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    
    mov rsi, pLicense
    mov rdi, pSignature
    
    ; Validate size
    cmp cbLicense, SIZEOF LICENSE_HEADER
    jb @@invalid_size
    cmp cbLicense, LICENSE_BLOB_MAX_SIZE
    ja @@invalid_size
    
    ; Copy to context buffer
    lea rbx, g_EnterpriseCtx.LicenseData
    mov rcx, rbx
    mov rdx, rsi
    mov r8, cbLicense
    call memcpy
    
    ; Copy signature
    lea rbx, g_EnterpriseCtx.Signature
    mov rcx, rbx
    mov rdx, rdi
    mov r8, RSA_SIGNATURE_SIZE
    call memcpy
    
    ; Validate cryptographically before storing
    call Enterprise_ValidateLicense
    test eax, eax
    jnz @@invalid_license
    
    ; Store in registry for persistence
    mov rcx, g_EnterpriseCtx.hKey
    mov edx, LICENSE_REG_VALUE
    mov r8d, REG_BINARY
    xor r9d, r9d
    lea rax, g_EnterpriseCtx.LicenseData
    mov [rsp+28h], rax                     ; 5th param (stack)
    mov eax, SIZEOF LICENSE_HEADER
    mov [rsp+30h], rax                     ; 6th param
    call RegSetValueExA
    
    mov rcx, g_EnterpriseCtx.hKey
    mov edx, LICENSE_SIG_VALUE
    mov r8d, REG_BINARY
    xor r9d, r9d
    lea rax, g_EnterpriseCtx.Signature
    mov [rsp+28h], rax
    mov eax, RSA_SIGNATURE_SIZE
    mov [rsp+30h], rax
    call RegSetValueExA
    
    mov eax, 0                             ; Success
    jmp @@exit
    
@@invalid_size:
    mov eax, 0C0000009h
    jmp @@exit
    
@@invalid_license:
    mov eax, 0C000000Ah
    jmp @@exit
    
@@exit:
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_InstallLicense ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_GetLicenseStatus
;  Returns current license state for UI display
;  Returns: EAX = License state enum
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_GetLicenseStatus PROC FRAME
    mov eax, g_EnterpriseCtx.State
    ret
Enterprise_GetLicenseStatus ENDP

; =============================================================================
;  Enterprise_GetFeatureString
;  Returns human-readable feature list for About dialog
;  RCX = Buffer, RDX = Buffer size
; =============================================================================
Enterprise_GetFeatureString PROC FRAME
    pBuffer EQU RCX
    cbBuffer EQU RDX
    
    push rbx
    push rsi
    push rdi
    
    mov rdi, pBuffer
    mov rsi, cbBuffer
    
    ; Check if we have Pro features
    mov rax, g_EnterpriseCtx.FeatureMask
    test rax, rax
    jz @@community
    
    ; Build feature string
    mov rbx, rax
    lea rax, szFeature800B
    call @@append_string
    
    test rbx, FEATURE_AVX512_PREMIUM
    jz @@check_swarm
    lea rax, szFeatureAVX
    call @@append_string
    
@@check_swarm:
    test rbx, FEATURE_DISTRIBUTED_SWARM
    jz @@check_quant
    lea rax, szFeatureSwarm
    call @@append_string
    
@@check_quant:
    test rbx, FEATURE_GPU_QUANT_4BIT
    jz @@done
    lea rax, szFeatureQuant
    call @@append_string
    jmp @@done
    
@@community:
    lea rax, szEditionCommunity
    mov rcx, rdi
    call strcpy
    jmp @@exit
    
@@append_string:
    ; Internal helper to append with separator
    push rax
    mov rcx, rdi
    call strlen
    add rdi, rax
    cmp rdi, pBuffer
    je @@skip_sep
    mov BYTE PTR [rdi], ','
    mov BYTE PTR [rdi+1], ' '
    add rdi, 2
@@skip_sep:
    pop rax
    mov rcx, rdi
    mov rdx, rax
    call strcpy
    ret                                     ; Returns to caller of append_string
    
@@done:
    mov eax, 0
    
@@exit:
    pop rdi
    pop rsi
    pop rbx
    ret
Enterprise_GetFeatureString ENDP

; Hook for Titan_Engine::Initialize
PUBLIC Titan_CheckEnterpriseUnlock
Titan_CheckEnterpriseUnlock PROC FRAME
    ; Called before initializing 800B model support
    mov ecx, FEATURE_800B_DUALENGINE
    call Enterprise_CheckFeature
    ret
Titan_CheckEnterpriseUnlock ENDP

; Hook before allocating large DMA buffers
PUBLIC Streaming_AllocateEnterpriseBuffer
Streaming_AllocateEnterpriseBuffer PROC FRAME
    Size EQU RCX
    
    push rcx
    call Enterprise_Unlock800BDualEngine
    test eax, eax
    pop rcx
    jz @@fail
    
    ; Proceed with allocation
    call VirtualAlloc                       ; Original allocation logic
    ret
    
@@fail:
    xor eax, eax                            ; Return NULL (allocation denied)
    ret
Streaming_AllocateEnterpriseBuffer ENDP

    write_reg_file(args.out, payload, sig)

if __name__ == "__main__":
